my soul / my life / my walking
a rose / a flower / a piece of clay
a period of time / for a while
those in bad states / miserable ones
those in good states / happy ones
did not seek / did not search
that of mine / that is my
hand it to me! / serve it!

lines / downs of the cheek / writing
do not trouble! / do not hurt!
solver of problems / opener of works

is the king's / is on the king

the peace of my soul / my beloved
the body of human / human body
the soul of humanity / human spirit
made an impact / left an effect
snare of tribulation / trap of love
torn to shreds / split into pieces
days of union / state of connection
those in bad and good states / miserable and happy
a human is my desire / I long for a human
becomes alive / is brought to life
Elder of the Magi / spiritual master

the extreme end of the night

do not hold cheap / do not underestimate

sentences.word: بنی آدم اعضای یکدیگرند
sentences.meaning: Human beings are members of one another,
sentences.translit: Bani-âdam a'zâye yekdigarand

sentences.word: که در آفرینش ز یک گوهرند
sentences.meaning: For in creation they are of one essence.
sentences.translit: Ke dar âfarinesh ze yek goharand

sentences.word: چو عضوی به درد آورد روزگار
sentences.meaning: If time brings suffering to one limb,
sentences.translit: Cho ozvi be dard âvarad ruzegâr

sentences.word: دگر عضوها را نماند قرار
sentences.meaning: The other limbs cannot remain at peace.
sentences.translit: Degar ozvhâ râ namânad gharâr

sentences.word: تو کز محنت دیگران بی غمی
sentences.meaning: You who are indifferent to the suffering of others,
sentences.translit: To kaz mehnate digarân bi ghami

sentences.word: نشاید که نامت نهند آدمی
sentences.meaning: Do not deserve to be called human.
sentences.translit: Nashâyad ke nâmat nahand âdami

sentences.word: ای ساربان آهسته ران کارام جانم می‌رود
sentences.meaning: O caravan leader, drive slowly, for the peace of my soul is departing,
sentences.translit: Ey sârebân âheste rân kârâme jânam miravad

sentences.word: وآن دل که با خود داشتم با دلستانم می‌رود
sentences.meaning: And that heart which I held within me is leaving with the stealer of my heart.
sentences.translit: Vân del ke bâ khod dâshtam bâ delsetânam miravad

sentences.word: من مانده‌ام مهجور از او بیچاره و رنجور از او
sentences.meaning: I remain separated from her, helpless and afflicted by her absence,
sentences.translit: Man mânde'am mahjur az u bichâre va ranjur az u

sentences.word: گویی که نیشی دور از او در استخوانم می‌رود
sentences.meaning: As though, far from her, a thorn is piercing deep into my bones.
sentences.translit: Gui ke nishi dur az u dar ostokhvânam miravad

sentences.word: گفتم به نیرنگ و فسون پنهان کنم ریش درون
sentences.meaning: I said I would hide the inner wound through tricks and spells,
sentences.translit: Goftam be neyrang o fosun penhân konam rishe darun

sentences.word: پنهان نمی‌ماند که خون بر آستانم می‌رود
sentences.meaning: But it cannot remain hidden, as blood flows upon my threshold.
sentences.translit: Penhân nemimânad ke khun bar âstânam miravad

sentences.word: محمل بدار ای ساروان تندی مکن با کاروان
sentences.meaning: Stop the litter, O caravan leader, do not rush the caravan,
sentences.translit: Mahmel bedâr ey sârevân tondi makon bâ kârevân

sentences.word: کز عشق آن سرو روان گویی روانم می‌رود
sentences.meaning: For out of love for that graceful cypress, it feels as if my life itself is departing.
sentences.translit: Kaz eshge ân sarve ravân gui ravânam miravad

sentences.word: تن آدمی شریف است به جان آدمیت
sentences.meaning: The human body is noble by virtue of the human soul,
sentences.translit: Tane âdami sharif ast be jâne âdamiyat

sentences.word: نه همین لباس زیباست نشان آدمیت
sentences.meaning: For a beautiful garment alone is not the sign of humanity.
sentences.translit: Na hamin lebâse zibâst neshâne âdamiyat

sentences.word: اگر آدمی به چشم است و دهان و گوش و بینی
sentences.meaning: If being human were merely about eyes, mouth, ears, and nose,
sentences.translit: Agar âdami be chashm ast o dahân o gush o bini

sentences.word: چه میان نقش دیوار و میان آدمیت
sentences.meaning: Then what difference would there be between a painting on a wall and humanity?
sentences.translit: Che miâne naghshe divâr o miâne âdamiyat

sentences.word: خور و خواب و خشم و شهوت شغب است و جهل و ظلمت
sentences.meaning: Eating, sleeping, anger, and lust are turbulence, ignorance, and darkness;
sentences.translit: Khor o khâb o khashm o shahvat shaghab ast o jahlo zolmat

sentences.word: حیوان خبر ندارد ز جهان آدمیت
sentences.meaning: The beast is unaware of the realm of humanity.
sentences.translit: Heyvân khabar nadârad ze jahâne âdamiyat

sentences.word: به حقیقت آدمی باش وگرنه مرغ باشد
sentences.meaning: Be human in reality, or else you are like a bird
sentences.translit: Be haghighat âdami bâsh va gar ne morgh bâshad

sentences.word: که همین سخن بگوید به زبان آدمیت
sentences.meaning: Which merely mimics these same words in the language of humans.
sentences.translit: Ke hamin sokhan beguyad be zabâne âdamiyat

sentences.word: گلی خوش‌بوی در حمام روزی
sentences.meaning: A piece of fragrant clay in the bath-house one day
sentences.translit: Goli khosh-buy dar hammâm ruzi

sentences.word: رسید از دست مخدومی به دستم
sentences.meaning: Reached my hand from the hand of a beloved friend.
sentences.translit: Resid az daste makhdumi be dastam

sentences.word: بدو گفتم که مشکی یا عبیری
sentences.meaning: I said to it: 'Are you musk or ambergris?
sentences.translit: Bedo goftam ke moshki yâ abiri

sentences.word: که از بوی دلاویز تو مستم
sentences.meaning: For I am intoxicated by your delightful scent.'
sentences.translit: Ke az buye delâvize to mastam

sentences.word: بگفتا من گلی ناچیز بودم
sentences.meaning: It replied: 'I was but a worthless piece of clay,
sentences.translit: Bageftâ man goli nâchiz budam

sentences.word: ولیکن مدتی با گل نشستم
sentences.meaning: But for a time, I sat in the company of the rose.
sentences.translit: Valikan moddati bâ gol neshastam

sentences.word: کمال همنشین در من اثر کرد
sentences.meaning: The perfection of my companion left its mark on me,
sentences.translit: Kamâle hamneshin dar man asar kard

sentences.word: وگرنه من همان خاکم که هستم
sentences.meaning: Otherwise, I am the same ordinary dust that I was.'
sentences.translit: Va gar ne man hamân khâkam ke hastam

sentences.word: سلسله موی دوست حلقه دام بلاست
sentences.meaning: The chain of the Friend's hair is the ring of the snare of tribulation;
sentences.translit: Selseleye muye dust halghaye dâme balâst

sentences.word: هر که در این حلقه نیست فارغ از این ماجراست
sentences.meaning: Whoever is not caught in this loop is free from this drama.
sentences.translit: Har ke dar in halghe nist fâregh az in mâjarâst

sentences.word: گر بزنندم به تیغ در نظرش بی‌دریغ
sentences.meaning: Even if they strike me with a sword in her presence without hesitation,
sentences.translit: Gar bezanandam be tigh dar nazarash bi-darigh

sentences.word: دیدن روی تو خوش کندر سر ما هواست
sentences.meaning: Beholding your face is joyous, for this desire resides in my head.
sentences.translit: Didane ruye to khosh kondar sare mâ havâst

sentences.word: عشق تو در جان من همچو نفس در بدن
sentences.meaning: Your love is in my soul like breath in the body;
sentences.translit: Eshghe to dar jâne man hamcho nafas dar badan

sentences.word: تا نفسم هست و جان روی توام پیش‌روست
sentences.meaning: As long as I have breath and life, your face is before my eyes.
sentences.translit: Tâ nafasam hast o jân ruye toam pish-rost

sentences.word: سعدی از اخلاق دوست هر چه برآید نکوست
sentences.meaning: Saadi, whatever comes from the Friend's temperament is good,
sentences.translit: Sa'di az akhlâge dust har che barâyad nekost

sentences.word: گر همه دشنام گوید گر همه لطف و عطاست
sentences.meaning: Whether it be all insults or all kindness and grace.
sentences.translit: Gar hame doshnâm guyad gar hame lotf o atâst

sentences.word: بشنو این نی چون شکایت می‌کند
sentences.meaning: Listen to this reed flute as it complains,
sentences.translit: Beshno in ney chon shekâyat mikonad

sentences.word: از جدایی‌ها حکایت می‌کند
sentences.meaning: Telling a tale of painful separations:
sentences.translit: Az jodâ'ihâ hekâyat mikonad

sentences.word: کز نیستان تا مرا ببریده‌اند
sentences.meaning: 'Ever since they cut me from the reed-bed,
sentences.translit: Kaz neyestân tâ marâ bobride'and

sentences.word: در نفیرم مرد و زن نالیده‌اند
sentences.meaning: My wailing has made men and women weep.
sentences.translit: Dar nafirem mard o zan nâlide'and

sentences.word: سینه خواهم شرحه شرحه از فراق
sentences.meaning: I want a heart torn shred by shred by exile,
sentences.translit: Sine khâham sharhe sharhe az ferâgh

sentences.word: تا بگویم شرح درد اشتیاق
sentences.meaning: So that I may explain the pain of longing.
sentences.translit: Tâ beguyam sharhe darde eshtiyâgh

sentences.word: هر کسی کو دور ماند از اصل خویش
sentences.meaning: Whoever remains far from their origin
sentences.translit: Har kasi ku dur mând az asle khish

sentences.word: بازجوید روزگار وصل خویش
sentences.meaning: Seeks back the days of their union.
sentences.translit: Bâz-juyad ruzegâre vasle khish

sentences.word: من به هر جمعیتی نالان شدم
sentences.meaning: I have cried out in every gathering,
sentences.translit: Man be har jam'iyati nâlân shodam

sentences.word: جفت بدحالان و خوش‌حالان شدم
sentences.meaning: Consorting with both the sorrowful and the joyful.
sentences.translit: Jofte badhâlân o khosh-hâlân shodam

sentences.word: هر کسی از ظن خود شد یار من
sentences.meaning: Everyone became my friend based on their own opinion,
sentences.translit: Har kasi az zanne khod shod yâre man

sentences.word: از درون من نجست اسرار من
sentences.meaning: But none sought out my secrets from within me.'
sentences.translit: Az darune man najast asrâre man

sentences.word: بازآ بازآ هر آنچه هستی بازآ
sentences.meaning: Come back, come back, whoever you are, come back!
sentences.translit: Bâz-â bâz-â har ânche hasti bâz-â

sentences.word: گر کافر و گبر و بت‌پرستی بازآ
sentences.meaning: Even if you are an unbeliever, a pagan, or a fire-worshipper, come back!
sentences.translit: Gar kâfar o gabr o bot-parasti bâz-â

sentences.word: این درگه ما درگه نومیدی نیست
sentences.meaning: This threshold of ours is not the portal of despair.
sentences.translit: In dargehe mâ dargehe nomidi nist

sentences.word: صد بار اگر توبه شکستی بازآ
sentences.meaning: Even if you have broken your vows a hundred times, come back!
sentences.translit: Sad bâr agar tob-e shekasti bâz-â

sentences.word: بنمای رخ که باغ و گلستانم آرزوست
sentences.meaning: Show your face, for I long for the garden and the meadow;
sentences.translit: Benmây rokh ke bâgh o golestânam ârezust

sentences.word: بگشای لب که قند فراوانم آرزوست
sentences.meaning: Open your lips, for I long for abundant sweetness.
sentences.translit: Begshây lab ke ghande farâvânam ârezust

sentences.word: ای آفتاب حسن برون آ دمی ز ابر
sentences.meaning: O sun of beauty, emerge from the cloud for a moment,
sentences.translit: Ey âftâbe hosn berun â dami ze abr

sentences.word: کان چهره مشعشع تابانم آرزوست
sentences.meaning: For I yearn for that brilliant, shining face.
sentences.translit: Kân chehreve moshash'a'e tâbânam ârezust

sentences.word: دی شیخ با چراغ همی‌گشت گرد شهر
sentences.meaning: Yesterday the elder with a lantern was wandering about the city,
sentences.translit: Dey sheykh bâ cherâgh hami-gasht gerde shahr

sentences.word: کز دیو و دد ملولم و انسانم آرزوست
sentences.meaning: Crying: 'I am weary of beasts and monsters, and I yearn for a true human!'
sentences.translit: Kaz div o dad malulam o ensânam ârezust

sentences.word: گفتند یافت می‌نشود جسته‌ایم ما
sentences.meaning: They said: 'We have searched, but he is not to be found.'
sentences.translit: Goftand yâft mishavad joste'im mâ

sentences.word: گفت آن که یافت می‌نشود آنم آرزوست
sentences.meaning: He replied: 'That which cannot be found is my heart's desire!'
sentences.translit: Goft ân ke yâft nemishavad ânam ârezust

sentences.word: مرده بدم زنده شدم گریه بدم خنده شدم
sentences.meaning: I was dead, I became alive; I was weeping, I became laughter;
sentences.translit: Morde bodam zende shodam gerye bodam khande shodam

sentences.word: دولت عشق آمد و من دولت پاینده شدم
sentences.meaning: The reign of love arrived, and I became an everlasting empire.
sentences.translit: Doulate eshgh âmad o man doulate pâyande shodam

sentences.word: دیده سیر است مرا جان دلیر است مرا
sentences.meaning: My eyes are sated, my soul is courageous,
sentences.translit: Dide sir ast marâ jâne dalir ast marâ

sentences.word: زهره شیر است مرا زهره تابنده شدم
sentences.meaning: I have the gall of a lion, and I have become a shining star.
sentences.translit: Zohreye shir ast marâ zohreye tâbende shodam

sentences.word: گفت که دیوانه نه‌ای لایق این خانه نه‌ای
sentences.meaning: Love said: 'You are not mad, you are not worthy of this house.'
sentences.translit: Goft ke divâne ne'i lâyeghe in khâne ne'i

sentences.word: رفته و دیوانه شدم سلسله بندنده شدم
sentences.meaning: I went and became mad, and I bound myself in chains.
sentences.translit: Rafte va divâne shodam selsele bandande shodam

sentences.word: گفت که سرمست نه‌ای رو که از این دست نه‌ای
sentences.meaning: Love said: 'You are not drunk, go, for you are not of this group.'
sentences.translit: Goft ke sarmast ne'i ro ke az in dast ne'i

sentences.word: رفته و سرمست شدم وز طرب آکنده شدم
sentences.meaning: I went and became drunk, and I filled myself with joy.
sentences.translit: Rafte va sarmast shodam vaz tarab âkende shodam

sentences.word: شکر کند چرخ فلک از شکر و لطف و کرم
sentences.meaning: The wheel of heaven gives thanks for that sweetness, grace, and bounty,
sentences.translit: Shokr konad charkhe falak az shokr o lotf o karam

sentences.word: کز طرب و بخشش او روشن و بخشنده شدم
sentences.meaning: For through his joy and giving, I have become bright and generous.
sentences.translit: Kaz tarab o bakhshishe u roshan o bakhshande shodam

sentences.word: از محبت تلخ‌ها شیرین شود
sentences.meaning: Through love, bitter things become sweet;
sentences.translit: Az mohabbat talkhhâ shirin shavad

sentences.word: از محبت مس‌ها زرین شود
sentences.meaning: Through love, pieces of copper become golden.
sentences.translit: Az mohabbat meshâ zarrin shavad

sentences.word: از محبت دردها صافی شود
sentences.meaning: Through love, dregs and pains become clear;
sentences.translit: Az mohabbat dardhâ sâfi shavad

sentences.word: از محبت دردها شافی شود
sentences.meaning: Through love, physical and spiritual aches are healed.
sentences.translit: Az mohabbat dardhâ shâfi shavad

sentences.word: از محبت مرده زنده می‌شود
sentences.meaning: Through love, the dead are brought to life;
sentences.translit: Az mohabbat morde zende mishavad

sentences.word: از محبت شاه بنده می‌شود
sentences.meaning: Through love, the king becomes a servant.
sentences.translit: Az mohabbat shâh bande mishavad

sentences.word: این محبت هم نتیجه دانش است
sentences.meaning: This love is also the result of true knowledge,
sentences.translit: In mohabbat ham natijeye dânesh ast

sentences.word: کی گزافه بر چنین تختی نشست
sentences.meaning: For when has folly ever sat upon such a throne?
sentences.translit: Key gozâfe bar chonin takhti neshast

sentences.word: الا یا ایها الساقی ادر کأسا و ناولها
sentences.meaning: O Winebearer, pass around the cup and hand it to me,
sentences.translit: Alâ yâ ayyohas-sâghi ader ka'san va nâvelhâ

sentences.word: که عشق آسان نمود اول ولی افتاد مشکل‌ها
sentences.meaning: For love seemed easy at first, but then difficulties arose.
sentences.translit: Ke eshgh âsân nemud avval vali oftâd moshkelhâ

sentences.word: به بوی نافه‌ای کاخر صبا زان طره بگشاید
sentences.meaning: For the scent of the musk pod which the morning breeze will finally unleash from those tresses,
sentences.translit: Be buye nâfe'i kâkhar sabâ zân torre bogshâyad

sentences.word: ز تاب جعد مشکینش چه خون افتاد در دل‌ها
sentences.meaning: What blood has fallen into our hearts from the twists of those dark curls.
sentences.translit: Ze tâbe ja'de meshkinash che khun oftâd dar delhâ

sentences.word: مرا در منزل جانان چه امن عیش چون هر دم
sentences.meaning: What security of pleasure is there for me in the beloved's house, when at every moment
sentences.translit: Marâ dar menzile jânân che amne eysh chon har dam

sentences.word: جرس فریاد می‌دارد که بربندید محمل‌ها
sentences.meaning: The caravan bell cries out: 'Pack up your litters, the journey begins!'
sentences.translit: Jaras faryâd midârad ke barbandid mahmelhâ

sentences.word: به می سجاده رنگین کن گرت پیر مغان گوید
sentences.meaning: Stain the prayer-carpet with wine if the Elder of the Magi tells you,
sentences.translit: Be mey sajjâde rangin kon garat pire moghân guyad

sentences.word: که سالک بی‌خبر نبود ز راه و رسم منزل‌ها
sentences.meaning: For the traveler is not unaware of the path and customs of the stations.
sentences.translit: Ke sâlek bikhabar nabvad ze râho rasme menzelhâ

sentences.word: یوسف گمگشته بازآید به کنعان غم مخور
sentences.meaning: Lost Joseph shall return to Canaan, do not grieve;
sentences.translit: Yusufe gomgashte bâz-âyad be kan'ân gham makhor

sentences.word: کلبه احزان شود روزی گلستان غم مخور
sentences.meaning: The cottage of sorrows shall one day become a rose garden, do not grieve.
sentences.translit: Kolbeye ahzân shavad ruzi golestân gham makhor

sentences.word: ای دل غمدیده حالت به شود دل بد مکن
sentences.meaning: O sorrowful heart, your state shall improve, do not think the worst;
sentences.translit: Ey dele ghamdide hâlat beh shavad del bad makon

sentences.word: وین سر شوریده بازآید به سامان غم مخور
sentences.meaning: And this distracted head shall return to order, do not grieve.
sentences.translit: Vin sare shuride bâz-âyad be sâmân gham makhor

sentences.word: گر بهار عمر باشد باز بر تخت چمن
sentences.meaning: If the spring of life returns once more upon the throne of the meadow,
sentences.translit: Gar bahâre omr bâshad bâz bar takhte chaman

sentences.word: چتر گل در سر کشی ای مرغ خوش‌خوان غم مخور
sentences.meaning: You shall pull a canopy of roses over your head, O sweet-singing bird, do not grieve.
sentences.translit: Chatre gol dar sar kashi ey morghe khosh-khân gham makhor

sentences.word: دور گردون گرد دو روزی بر مراد ما نرفت
sentences.meaning: If the wheel of time did not turn according to our desires for a couple of days,
sentences.translit: Doure gardun gar do ruzi bar morâde mâ naraft

sentences.word: دائما یکسان نباشد حال دوران غم مخور
sentences.meaning: The state of time is never constantly the same, do not grieve.
sentences.translit: Dâ'emâ yeksân nabâshad hâle dourân gham makhor

sentences.word: هان مشو نومید چون واقف نه‌ای از سر غیب
sentences.meaning: Behold, do not despair, for you are unaware of the secrets of the unseen;
sentences.translit: Hân masho nomid chon vâghef ne'i az سر gheyeb

sentences.word: باشد اندر پرده بازی‌های پنهان غم مخور
sentences.meaning: Behind the veil, there are hidden games going on, do not grieve.
sentences.translit: Bâshad andar parde bâzihâye penhân gham makhor

sentences.word: مژده ای دل که مسیحا نفسی می‌آید
sentences.meaning: Good news, O heart! One with a messianic breath is arriving,
sentences.translit: Mojde ey del ke masihâ nafasi mi-âyad

sentences.word: که ز انفاس خوشش بوی کسی می‌آید
sentences.meaning: For from his sweet breaths, the scent of someone beloved is coming.
sentences.translit: Ke ze anfâse khoshash buye kasi mi-âyad

sentences.word: از غم هجر مکن ناله و فریاد که دوش
sentences.meaning: Do not weep and wail out of grief of separation, for last night
sentences.translit: Az gham_e hejr makon nâle va faryâd ke dush

sentences.word: زده‌ام فالی و فریادرسی می‌آید
sentences.meaning: I drew a fortune, and a savior is coming.
sentences.translit: Zade'am fâli va faryâd-rasi mi-âyad

sentences.word: ز آتش وادی ایمن نه منم خرم و بس
sentences.meaning: I am not the only one made joyful by the fire of the Valley of Safety ;
sentences.translit: Ze âtash_e vâdiye ayman na manam khorram o bas

sentences.word: موسی اینجا به امید قبسی می‌آید
sentences.meaning: Even Moses comes here in hope of a glowing ember.
sentences.translit: Musa injâ be omide ghabasi mi-âyad

sentences.word: کس ندانست که منزلگه معشوق کجاست
sentences.meaning: No one knew where the resting place of the Beloved is;
sentences.translit: Kas nadânast ke menzilgehe ma'shugh kojâst

sentences.word: این‌قدر هست که بانگ جرسی می‌آید
sentences.meaning: Only this much is certain, that the sound of a caravan bell is ringing.
sentences.translit: In-ghadr hast ke bânge jarasi mi-âyad

sentences.word: اگر آن ترک شیرازی به دست آرد دل ما را
sentences.meaning: If that Shirazi Turk would take my heart in hand,
sentences.translit: Agar ân torke shirâzi be dast ârad dele mâ râ

sentences.word: به خال هندویش بخشم سمرقند و بخارا را
sentences.meaning: For her dark mole I would give away Samarkand and Bukhara.
sentences.translit: Be khâle henduyash bakhsham Samarghand o Bokhârâ râ

sentences.word: بده ساقی می باقی که در جنت نخواهی یافت
sentences.meaning: Hand me the remaining wine, O cupbearer, for in Paradise you will not find
sentences.translit: Bede sâghi meye bâghi ke dar jannat nakhvâhi yâft

sentences.word: کنار آب رکن‌آباد و گلگشت مصلا را
sentences.meaning: The banks of the Roknabad stream and the garden pathways of Mosalla.
sentences.translit: Kenâre âbe Rokn-âbâd o golgashte Mosallâ râ

sentences.word: فغان کاین لولیان شوخ شیرین‌کار شهرآشوب
sentences.meaning: Alas, for these playful, sweet-mannered gypsies who throw the city into chaos,
sentences.translit: Faghân k'in luliyâne shokhe shirinkâre shahr-âshub

sentences.word: چنان بردند صبر از دل که ترکان خوان یغما را
sentences.meaning: Have looted patience from my heart as Turkish soldiers rob a banquet table.
sentences.translit: Chonân bordand sabr az del ke torkân khâne yaghmâ râ

sentences.word: ز عشق ناتمام ما جمال یار مستغنی است
sentences.meaning: The Beloved's beauty has no need for our imperfect love;
sentences.translit: Ze eshgh_e nâtamâme mâ jamâle yâr mostaghni ast

sentences.word: به آب و رنگ و خال و خط چه حاجت روی زیبا را
sentences.meaning: What need does a gorgeous face have for makeup, rouge, moles, and lines?
sentences.translit: Be âb o rango khalo khat che hâjat ruye zibâ râ

sentences.word: دوش وقت سحر از غصه نجاتم دادند
sentences.meaning: Last night at dawn, they delivered me from grief,
sentences.translit: Dush vaghte sahar az ghosse nejâtam dâdand

sentences.word: واندر آن ظلمت شب آب حیاتم دادند
sentences.meaning: And in that darkness of the night, they gave me the water of life.
sentences.translit: Vandar ân zolmate shab âbe hayâtam dâdand

sentences.word: چه مبارک سحری بود و چه فرخنده شبی
sentences.meaning: What a blessed dawn it was, and what a glorious night,
sentences.translit: Che mobârak sahari bud o che farkhonde shabi

sentences.word: آن شب قدر که این تازه براتم دادند
sentences.meaning: That Night of Power, when they handed me this new decree of salvation.
sentences.translit: Ân shabe ghadr ke in tâze barâtam dâdand

sentences.word: بعد از این روی من و آینه وصف جمال
sentences.meaning: From now on, there is only me and the mirror describing her beauty,
sentences.translit: Ba'd az in ruye man o âyineye vasfe jamâl

sentences.word: که در آن‌جا خبر از جلوه ذاتم دادند
sentences.meaning: For in that mirror, they gave me news of the manifestation of the Divine Essence.
sentences.translit: Ke dar ân-jâ khabar az jelveye zâtam dâdand

sentences.word: من اگر کامروا گشتم و خوش‌دل چه عجب
sentences.meaning: If I am now successful and happy, what wonder is there?
sentences.translit: Man agar kâmravâ gashtam o khoshdel che ajab

sentences.word: مستحق بودم و این‌ها به زکاتم دادند
sentences.meaning: I was deserving, and they gave me these blessings as spiritual charity.
sentences.translit: Mostahagh budam o inhâ be zakâtam dâdand

sentences.word: اسرار ازل را نه تو دانی و نه من
sentences.meaning: The secrets of eternity are known neither to you nor to me,
sentences.translit: Asrâre azal râ na to dâni va na man

sentences.word: وین حرف معما نه تو خوانی و نه من
sentences.meaning: And this riddle's text can be read neither by you nor by me.
sentences.translit: Vin harfe mo'ammâ na to khvâni va na man

sentences.word: هست از پس پرده گفتگوی من و تو
sentences.meaning: There is talk of you and me behind the veil,
sentences.translit: Hast az pase parde goftoguye man o to

sentences.word: چون پرده برافتد نه تو مانی و نه من
sentences.meaning: But when the veil drops, neither you nor I shall remain.
sentences.translit: Chon parde bar-oftad na to mâni va na man

sentences.word: این کوزه چو من عاشق زاری بوده است
sentences.meaning: This clay pot was once a weeping lover like me,
sentences.translit: In kuze cho man âsheghe zâri bude ast

sentences.word: در بند رخ نکوی یاری بوده است
sentences.meaning: Entrapped by the beautiful face of a beloved.
sentences.translit: Dar bande rokhe nokuye yâri bude ast

sentences.word: این دسته که بر گردن او می‌بینی
sentences.meaning: This handle which you see upon its neck
sentences.translit: In daste ke bar gardene u mibini

sentences.word: دستی است که بر گردن یاری بوده است
sentences.meaning: Is an arm that was once wrapped around a beloved's neck.
sentences.translit: Dasti ast ke bar gardene yâri bude ast

sentences.word: این قافله عمر عجب می‌گذرد
sentences.meaning: This caravan of life passes in a strange, wondrous way;
sentences.translit: In ghâfeleye omr ajab migozarad

sentences.word: دریاب دمی که با طرب می‌گذرد
sentences.meaning: Seize the moment that is passing in joy.
sentences.translit: Daryâb dami ke bâ tarab migozarad

sentences.word: ساقی غم فردای حریفان چه خوری
sentences.meaning: Cupbearer, why do you worry about the tomorrow of rivals?
sentences.translit: Sâghi ghame fardâye harifân che khori

sentences.word: پیش آر پیاله را که شب می‌گذرد
sentences.meaning: Bring forward the goblet, for the night is slipping away.
sentences.translit: Pish âr piyâle râ ke shab migozarad

sentences.word: خیام اگر ز باده مستی خوش باش
sentences.meaning: Khayyam, if you are drunk on wine, be happy!
sentences.translit: Khayyâm agar ze bâde masti khosh bâsh

sentences.word: با ماه رخی اگر نشستی خوش باش
sentences.meaning: If you are sitting with a moon-faced beauty, be happy!
sentences.translit: Bâ mâh-rokhi agar neshasti khosh bâsh

sentences.word: چون عاقبت کار جهان نیستی است
sentences.meaning: Since the ultimate end of the world is non-existence,
sentences.translit: Chon âghebate kâre jahân nisti ast

sentences.word: انگار که نیستی چو هستی خوش باش
sentences.meaning: Imagine you already do not exist; as long as you do, be happy!
sentences.translit: Engâr ke nisti cho hasti khosh bâsh

sentences.word: گویند کسان بهشت با حور خوش است
sentences.meaning: Some say that paradise with beautiful maidens is sweet,
sentences.translit: Guyand kasân behesht bâ hur khosh ast

sentences.word: من می‌گویم که آب انگور خوش است
sentences.meaning: I say that the juice of the grape is sweet.
sentences.translit: Man miguyam ke âbe angur khosh ast

sentences.word: این نقد بگیر و دست از آن نسیه بدار
sentences.meaning: Take this cash of the present, and let go of that credit,
sentences.translit: In naghd beghir o dast az ân nesye bedâr

sentences.word: کاواز دهل شنیدن از دور خوش است
sentences.meaning: For the beating of the drum sounds sweet only from afar.
sentences.translit: K'âvâze dohol shenidan az dur khosh ast

sentences.word: به نام خداوند جان و خرد
sentences.meaning: In the name of the Lord of soul and wisdom,
sentences.translit: Be nâme khodâvande jân o kherad

sentences.word: کزین برتر اندیشه برنگذرد
sentences.meaning: Than which no higher thought can pass.
sentences.translit: K'azin bartar andishe bar-nagzard

sentences.word: خداوند نام و خداوند جای
sentences.meaning: The Lord of renown and the Lord of place,
sentences.translit: Khodâvande nâm o khodâvande jây

sentences.word: خداوند روزی‌ده رهنمای
sentences.meaning: The Giver of daily bread and the Guide.
sentences.translit: Khodâvande ruzi-deh rahnemây

sentences.word: خداوند کیوان و گردان سپهر
sentences.meaning: The Lord of Saturn and the rotating heavens,
sentences.translit: Khodâvande keyvân o gardâne sepehr

sentences.word: فروزنده ماه و ناهید و مهر
sentences.meaning: The Illuminator of the Moon, Venus, and the Sun.
sentences.translit: Foruzandeye mâh o Nâhid o mehr

sentences.word: ز نام و نشان و گمان برتر است
sentences.meaning: He is far above name, sign, and imagination;
sentences.translit: Ze nâmo neshâno gomân bartar ast

sentences.word: نگارنده برشده پیکر است
sentences.meaning: He is the Designer of the exalted constellations.
sentences.translit: Negârandeye bar-shodey peykar ast

sentences.word: به بینندگان آفریننده را
sentences.meaning: With these physical eyes, the Creator
sentences.translit: Be binandegân âfarinandeye râ

sentences.word: نبینی مرنجان دو بیننده را
sentences.meaning: You cannot see; do not trouble those two eyes.
sentences.translit: Nabi'ni maranjân do binandeye râ

sentences.word: نیابد بدو نیز اندیشه راه
sentences.meaning: Intellect itself cannot find a path to Him,
sentences.translit: Nayâbad bedo niz andishe râh

sentences.word: که او برتر از نام و از جایگاه
sentences.meaning: For He is far beyond name and location.
sentences.translit: Ke u bartar az nâmo az jâygâh

sentences.word: خرد رهنمای و خرد دلگشای
sentences.meaning: Wisdom is the guide, and wisdom is the opener of hearts;
sentences.translit: Kherad rahnemây o kherad delgoshây

sentences.word: خرد دست گیرد به هر دو سرای
sentences.meaning: Wisdom holds your hand in both worlds.
sentences.translit: Kherad dast ghirad be har do sarây

sentences.word: خرد تیره و خرد شادمان
sentences.meaning: Wisdom makes you grave, and wisdom makes you joyful;
sentences.translit: Kherad tire va kherad shâdmân

sentences.word: خرد باد جان تو را پاسبان
sentences.meaning: May wisdom be the protector of your soul.
sentences.translit: Kherad bâd jâne to râ pâsebân

sentences.word: نخستین نشان خرد آن بود
sentences.meaning: The very first sign of wisdom is this,
sentences.translit: Nakhostin neshâne kherad ân bovad

sentences.word: که از بد به گیتی هراسان بود
sentences.meaning: That one fears and retreats from evil in the world.
sentences.translit: Ke az bad be ghiti harâsân bovad

sentences.word: توانا بود هر که دانا بود
sentences.meaning: Capable and powerful is he who is wise,
sentences.translit: Tavânâ bovad har ke dânâ bovad

sentences.word: ز دانش دل پیر برنا بود
sentences.meaning: And through knowledge, the heart of the old man grows young.
sentences.translit: Ze dânesh dele pir bornâ bovad

sentences.word: از این پرده برتر سخن‌گاه نیست
sentences.meaning: There is no higher stage for speech than this theme,
sentences.translit: Az in parde bartar sokhan-gâh nist

sentences.word: به هستیش اندیشه را راه نیست
sentences.meaning: And thought has no path to God's ultimate essence.
sentences.translit: Be hastiyash andishe râ râh nist

sentences.word: یکی داستانست پر آب چشم
sentences.meaning: Here is a tale full of tears,
sentences.translit: Yaki dâstânast pore âbe chashm

sentences.word: دل نازک از رستم آید به خشم
sentences.meaning: A tender heart will grow angry with Rostam.
sentences.translit: Dele nâzok az Rostam âyad be khashm

sentences.word: اگر تندبادی برآید ز کنج
sentences.meaning: If a violent wind blows from a corner,
sentences.translit: Agar tond-bâdi bar-âyad ze konj

sentences.word: به خاک افکند نارسیده ترنج
sentences.meaning: And casts down an unripe orange to the ground,
sentences.translit: Be khâk afkanad nâreside toronj

sentences.word: نه دانی که آن باد با او چه کرد
sentences.meaning: Do you not know what that wind did to it,
sentences.translit: Na dâni ke ân bâd bâ u che kard

sentences.word: که از شاخ بی وقت او را ببرد
sentences.meaning: That it cut it off from the branch before its time?
sentences.translit: Ke az shâkhe bi-vaght u râ bobord

sentences.word: به بازی‌گری‌های چرخ بلند
sentences.meaning: Look at the playful games of the high heavens,
sentences.translit: Be bâzigharihâye charkhe boland

sentences.word: نگاه کن که دارد به ما بس گزند
sentences.meaning: Which hold so much harm and cruelty for us.
sentences.translit: Negâh kon ke dârad be mâ bas gazand

sentences.word: چنین است رسم سرای درشت
sentences.meaning: Such is the custom of this rough dwelling-place :
sentences.translit: Chonin ast rasme sarâye dorosht

sentences.word: یکی را نوازد یکی را بکشت
sentences.meaning: It caresses one, and slays another.
sentences.translit: Yaki râ navâzad yaki râ bokosht

sentences.word: دریغ است ایران که ویران شود
sentences.meaning: It is a tragedy that Iran should be ruined,
sentences.translit: Darigh ast Irân ke virân shavad

sentences.word: کنام پلنگان و شیران شود
sentences.meaning: And become the lair of leopards and lions.
sentences.translit: Konâme palangân o shirân shavad

sentences.word: چو ایران نباشد تن من مباد
sentences.meaning: If Iran is not to exist, let my body cease to be,
sentences.translit: Cho Irân nabâshad tane man mobâd

sentences.word: بدین بوم و بر زنده یک تن مباد
sentences.meaning: May not a single soul remain alive in this land.
sentences.translit: Bedin bumo bar zende yek tan mobâd

sentences.word: همه روی جنگی به کار آوریم
sentences.meaning: Let us all bring our warrior faces to the battlefield,
sentences.translit: Hame ruye jangy be kâr âverim

sentences.word: از آن پس جهان تنگ‌تار آوریم
sentences.meaning: And make the world narrow and dark for our foes.
sentences.translit: Az ân pas jahân tang-târ âverim

sentences.word: اگر سر به سر تن به کشتن دهیم
sentences.meaning: Even if we all, from first to last, give our bodies to death,
sentences.translit: Agar sar be sar tan be koshtan dahim

sentences.word: از آن به که کشور به دشمن دهیم
sentences.meaning: It is far better than handing our country to the enemy.
sentences.translit: Az ân beh ke keshvar be doshman dahim

sentences.word: بیا تا همه روی به جنگ آوریم
sentences.meaning: Come, let us all turn our faces to battle,
sentences.translit: Biyâ tâ hame ruy be jang âverim

sentences.word: به دشمن جهان سخت و تنگ آوریم
sentences.meaning: And make the world harsh and narrow for the enemy.
sentences.translit: Be doshman jahân sakht o tang âverim

sentences.word: بسی رنج بردم در این سال سی
sentences.meaning: Great pain I suffered during these thirty years,
sentences.translit: Basi ranj bordam dar in sâle si

sentences.word: عجم زنده کردم بدین پارسی
sentences.meaning: But I revived the Persian identity through this Persian tongue.
sentences.translit: Ajam zende kardam bedin Pârsi

sentences.word: پی افکندم از نظم کاخی بلند
sentences.meaning: I have cast the foundation of a tall palace of verse,
sentences.translit: Pey afkandam az nazm kâkhi boland

sentences.word: که از باد و باران نیابد گزند
sentences.meaning: Which shall suffer no harm from wind and rain.
sentences.translit: Ke az bâd o bârân nayâbad gazand

sentences.word: بناهای آباد گردد خراب
sentences.meaning: Magnificent buildings will eventually fall to ruin,
sentences.translit: Banâhâye âbâd gardad kharâb

sentences.word: ز باران و از تابش آفتاب
sentences.meaning: From rain and the burning rays of the sun.
sentences.translit: Ze bârân o az tâbishe âftâb

sentences.word: نمیرم از این پس که من زنده‌ام
sentences.meaning: I shall never die from now on, for I am alive,
sentences.translit: Namiram az in pas ke man zende'am

sentences.word: که تخم سخن را پراکنده‌ام
sentences.meaning: Since I have scattered the seeds of this language.
sentences.translit: Ke tokhme sokhan râ parâkande'am

sentences.word: هر آن کس که دارد هش و رای و دین
sentences.meaning: Whoever possesses intelligence, wisdom, and faith,
sentences.translit: Har ân kas ke dârad hosh o râyo din

sentences.word: پس از مرگ بر من کند آفرین
sentences.meaning: Will send blessings upon me after my death.
sentences.translit: Pas az marg bar man konad âfarin

sentences.word: آفرین جان‌آفرین پاک را
sentences.meaning: Blessings upon the holy Creator of the soul,
sentences.translit: Âfarin jân-âfarine pâk râ

sentences.word: آن که جان بخشید مشتی خاک را
sentences.meaning: He who gave life to a handful of dust.
sentences.translit: Ân ke jân bakhshid moshti khâk râ

sentences.word: هست ما را پادشاهی بی‌خلاف
sentences.meaning: We have a King indeed without dispute,
sentences.translit: Hast mâ râ pâdeshâhi bi-khelâf

sentences.word: در پس کوهی که هست آن کوه قاف
sentences.meaning: Behind a mountain which is called Mount Qaf.
sentences.translit: Dar pase kuhi ke hast ân kuhe Ghâf

sentences.word: نام او سیمرغ سلطان جهان
sentences.meaning: His name is Simurgh, the Sovereign of the universe;
sentences.translit: Nâme u Simorgh soltâne jahân

sentences.word: او به ما نزدیک و ما از وی نهان
sentences.meaning: He is close to us, and yet we are hidden from Him.
sentences.translit: U be mâ nazdiko mâ az vey nahân

sentences.word: در حریم عز او آرام نیست
sentences.meaning: In His court of glory, there is no rest,
sentences.translit: Dar harime ezze u ârâm nist

sentences.word: زان که آن جا هیچ کس را نام نیست
sentences.meaning: For in that place, no one retains an individual identity.
sentences.translit: Zân ke ân jâ hich kas râ nâm nist

sentences.word: صد هزاران خلق سرگردان اوست
sentences.meaning: Hundreds of thousands of creatures are wandering lost in search of Him,
sentences.translit: Sad hezârân khalghe sergardâne ust

sentences.word: در طلب سرگشته و حیران اوست
sentences.meaning: Struggling and bewildered in their quest for Him.
sentences.translit: Dar talab sargashte va heyrâne ust

sentences.word: گفت ما را هفت وادی در ره است
sentences.meaning: He said: 'Seven Valleys lie ahead on our path,
sentences.translit: Goft mâ râ haft vâdi dar rah ast

sentences.word: چون گذشتی زان سپس منزلگه است
sentences.meaning: Only when you cross them will you reach the final resting place.
sentences.translit: Chon gozashti zân sepas menzilgah ast

sentences.word: اولت وادی طلب آغاز کار
sentences.meaning: First is the Valley of Search, the beginning of the work;
sentences.translit: Avvalat vâdiye talab âghâze kâr

sentences.word: وادیت دوم عشق آمد بی‌کنار
sentences.meaning: Second is the Valley of Love, which has no shore.
sentences.translit: Vâdiyat dovvom eshgh âmad bi-kenâr

sentences.word: وادی سوم معرفت را جایگاه
sentences.meaning: The third Valley is the seat of Knowledge;
sentences.translit: Vâdiye sevvom ma'refat râ jâygâh

sentences.word: وادی چهارم استغنا به راه
sentences.meaning: The fourth Valley on the road is Independence and Detachment.
sentences.translit: Vâdiye chahârom estighnâ be râh

sentences.word: وادی پنجم توحید پاک
sentences.meaning: The fifth Valley is pure Unity;
sentences.translit: Vâdiye panjom touhide pâk

sentences.word: وادی ششم حیرت دردناک
sentences.meaning: The sixth Valley is painful Bewilderment.
sentences.translit: Vâdiye sheshom heyrate dardnâk

sentences.word: وادی هفتم فقر است و فنا
sentences.meaning: The seventh Valley is Poverty and Annihilation,
sentences.translit: Vâdiye haftom faghr ast o fanâ

sentences.word: بعد از این دیگر کجا یابی بقا
sentences.meaning: After this, where else can you find eternal life?'
sentences.translit: Ba'd az in digar kojâ yâbi baghâ

sentences.word: یک شبی پروانگان جمع آمدند
sentences.meaning: One night, the moths gathered together,
sentences.translit: Yek shabi parvânegân jam' âmadand

sentences.word: در مضیقی طالب شمع آمدند
sentences.meaning: In a narrow chamber, seeking the candle.
sentences.translit: Dar mozighi tâlebe shama' âmadand

sentences.word: جمله می‌گفتند می‌باید یکی
sentences.meaning: They all said: 'There must be one among us
sentences.translit: Jomle migoftand mibâyad yaki

sentences.word: کو خبر آرد ز شمعمان اندکی
sentences.meaning: Who can bring us some news of our candle.'
sentences.translit: Ku khabar ârad ze sham'amân andaki

sentences.word: شد یکی پروانه تا قصر وصال
sentences.meaning: One moth set off to the palace of union,
sentences.translit: Shod yaki parvâne tâ ghasre vesâl

sentences.word: دید اندر نور شمع آن سرخ بال
sentences.meaning: And saw that glowing wing inside the candle's light.
sentences.translit: Did andar nure sham' ân sorkh bâl

sentences.word: او ز شمع آمد خبر داد از جمال
sentences.meaning: He returned from the candle and gave news of its beauty,
sentences.translit: U ze sham' âmad khabar dâd az jamâl

sentences.word: گفت این است نشان نور و کمال
sentences.meaning: Saying: 'This is the sign of light and perfection.'
sentences.translit: Goft in ast neshâne nuro kamâl

sentences.word: گفت پیر مصلحت را جان من
sentences.meaning: The wise elder said: 'O my dear soul,
sentences.translit: Goft pire maslahat râ jâne man

sentences.word: این نشانی نیست از جانان من
sentences.meaning: This is no real trace of my Beloved.'
sentences.translit: In neshâni nist az jânâne man

sentences.word: گم شدم در خود چنان کز خویش ناپیدا شدم
sentences.meaning: I became so lost in myself that I vanished from my own sight,
sentences.translit: Gom shodam dar khod chonân kaz khish nâpeydâ shodam

sentences.word: شبنمی بودم ز دریا غرق در دریا شدم
sentences.meaning: I was a dewdrop from the ocean, and I became drowned in the ocean.
sentences.translit: Shabnami budam ze daryâ ghargh dar daryâ shodam

sentences.word: هر که در عشق تو مخروبه شد از دست رفت
sentences.meaning: Whoever becomes ruined in your love is lost to the world,
sentences.translit: Har ke dar eshghe to makhroube shod az dast raft

sentences.word: چون به عشق تو رسیدم مست و بی‌پروا شدم
sentences.meaning: When I attained your love, I became intoxicated and reckless.
sentences.translit: Chon be eshghe to rasidam mast o bi-parvâ shodam

sentences.word: جان ز من بگسست و تن بی‌خویش در کار تو شد
sentences.meaning: My soul broke away from me, and my body became mindless in your service,
sentences.translit: Jân ze man bogsast o tan bi-khish dar kâre to shod

sentences.word: تا ز بند خویشتن رستم عجب شیدا شدم
sentences.meaning: Once I escaped the shackles of self, how wondrously mad I became.
sentences.translit: Tâ ze bande khishtan rostam ajab sheydâ shodam

sentences.word: چون دل من محرم اسرار غیب عشق گشت
sentences.meaning: When my heart became a confidant of the unseen secrets of love,
sentences.translit: Chon dele man mahrame asrâre gheybe eshgh gasht

sentences.word: در میان جمع مستان سرور و پیدا شدم
sentences.meaning: I became a leader and visible among the gathering of the drunkards.
sentences.translit: Dar miâne jam'e mastân sarvar o peydâ shodam

sentences.word: بعد از این وادی فقر است و فنا
sentences.meaning: Next lies the Valley of Poverty and Annihilation,
sentences.translit: Ba'd az in vâdiye faghr ast o fanâ

sentences.word: کی بود اینجا سخن گفتن روا
sentences.meaning: When is it ever fitting to speak words here?
sentences.translit: Key bovad injâ sokhan goftan ravâ

sentences.word: عین این وادی فراموشی بود
sentences.meaning: The very essence of this valley is forgetfulness,
sentences.translit: Eyne in vâdi farâmushi bovad

sentences.word: گنگی و کری و بیهوشی بود
sentences.meaning: It is dumbness, deafness, and unconsciousness.
sentences.translit: Gongi o karri o bihushi bovad

sentences.word: صد هزاران سایه جاوید تو
sentences.meaning: Hundreds of thousands of your eternal shadows
sentences.translit: Sad hezârân sâyeye jâvide to

sentences.word: گم شود در یک شعاع شید تو
sentences.meaning: Will vanish in a single ray of your blazing sun.
sentences.translit: Gom shavad dar yek sho'â'e shide to

sentences.word: هر که در دریا فنا شد سر به سر
sentences.meaning: Whoever is completely dissolved in this ocean,
sentences.translit: Har ke dar daryâ fanâ shod sar-be-sar

sentences.word: او دگر هرگز نیابد زان اثر
sentences.meaning: Will never again leave any trace of themselves behind.
sentences.translit: U degar hargez nayâbad zân asar

sentences.word: ای نام تو بهترین سرآغاز
sentences.meaning: O Name of Yours, the best beginning!
sentences.translit: Ey nâme to behtarin sar-âghâz

sentences.word: بی‌نام تو نامه کی کنم باز
sentences.meaning: Without your name, how could I ever open this book?
sentences.translit: Bi-nâme to nâme key konam bâz

sentences.word: ای یاد تو مونس روانم
sentences.meaning: O remembrance of You, the companion of my soul!
sentences.translit: Ey yâde to monese ravânam

sentences.word: جز نام تو نیست بر زبانم
sentences.meaning: There is nothing on my tongue except Your name.
sentences.translit: Joz nâme to nist bar zabânam

sentences.word: ای کارگشای هر رمیده
sentences.meaning: O Solver of the problems of every wanderer,
sentences.translit: Ey kâr-goshâye har ramide

sentences.word: سرچشمه رحمت رسیده
sentences.meaning: The source of ultimate mercy which has arrived.
sentences.translit: Sar-cheshmeye rahmate raside

sentences.word: سازنده کار هر بنده
sentences.meaning: The Arranger of the affairs of every servant,
sentences.translit: Sâzandeye kâre har bande

sentences.word: دارنده چرخ شتابنده
sentences.meaning: The Upholder of the fast-turning heavens.
sentences.translit: Dârandeye charkhe shetâbande

sentences.word: در دل ز غمت چراغ دارم
sentences.meaning: In my heart, I keep a lamp lit from your grief,
sentences.translit: Dar del ze ghamat cherâgh dâram

sentences.word: در سر ز هوای باغ دارم
sentences.meaning: And in my head, I hold the desire for Your garden.
sentences.translit: Dar sar ze havâye bâgh dâram

sentences.word: چو شب بنشست فرهاد بلاکش
sentences.meaning: When night fell upon the suffering Farhad,
sentences.translit: Cho shab benshast Farhâde balâ-kash

sentences.word: به یاد لعل شیرین با دلی خوش
sentences.meaning: With a happy heart, thinking of the ruby lips of Shirin,
sentences.translit: Be yâde la'le Shirin bâ deli khosh

sentences.word: گرفت آن تیشه بی‌رحم در دست
sentences.meaning: He took that merciless axe in hand,
sentences.translit: Gereft ân tisheye bi-rahm dar dast

sentences.word: به ضرب کوه خارا بند بشکست
sentences.meaning: And with blows, broke the barriers of the granite mountain.
sentences.translit: Be zarbe kuhe khârâ band beshkest

sentences.word: به هر ضربت که بر سنگ آوریدی
sentences.meaning: With every blow that he struck upon the stone,
sentences.translit: Be har zarbat ke bar sang âvaridi

sentences.word: ز سنگ خارا خون دل چکیدی
sentences.meaning: The blood of his heart dripped from the granite rock.
sentences.translit: Ze sange khârâ khune del chakidi

sentences.word: صدای تیشه او در کوهساران
sentences.meaning: The sound of his pickaxe in the mountains
sentences.translit: Sedâye tisheye u dar kuhsârân

sentences.word: طنین‌انداز شد چون جویباران
sentences.meaning: Echoed around like flowing streams.
sentences.translit: Tanin-andâz shod chon juybârân

sentences.word: بگفتا عشق شیرین است کارم
sentences.meaning: He said: 'The love of Shirin is my work,
sentences.translit: Bageftâ eshghe Shirin ast kâram

sentences.word: به غیر از جان‌فشانی چاره ندارم
sentences.meaning: And I have no choice except to sacrifice my life.'
sentences.translit: Be gheyraz jân-feshâni châre nadâram

sentences.word: خداوندا در توفیق بگشای
sentences.meaning: O Lord, open the door of success!
sentences.translit: Khodâvondâ dare toufigh begshây

sentences.word: نظامی را ره تحقیق بنمای
sentences.meaning: Show Nizami the path of true verification.
sentences.translit: Nezâmi râ rahe tahghigh benmây

sentences.word: دلی ده کو ز خود بیزار باشد
sentences.meaning: Grant me a heart that is weary of its own ego,
sentences.translit: Deli deh ku ze khod bizâr bâshad

sentences.word: به عشق تو جهان‌افروز باشد
sentences.meaning: And which lights up the world with Your love.
sentences.translit: Be eshghe to jahân-afruz bâshad

sentences.word: زبانم را به حمدت سازور کن
sentences.meaning: Make my tongue harmonized with Your praise,
sentences.translit: Zabânam râ be hamdat sâzvar kon

sentences.word: روانم را ز نورت باخبر کن
sentences.meaning: And make my soul aware of Your light.
sentences.translit: Ravânam râ ze nurat bâ-khabar kon

sentences.word: در این دیوان که آغازش تو باشی
sentences.meaning: In this book of poetry which starts with You,
sentences.translit: Dar in divân ke âghâzash to bâshi

sentences.word: نخواهم جز ثنای تو تراشی
sentences.meaning: I wish to carve out nothing but Your praise.
sentences.translit: Nakhvâham joz sanâye to tarâshi

sentences.word: هدایت کن مرا در راه پاکی
sentences.meaning: Guide me on the path of purity,
sentences.translit: Hedâyat kon marâ dar râhe pâki

sentences.word: رهایم کن ز بند درد و خاکی
sentences.meaning: And deliver me from the shackles of pain and dust.
sentences.translit: Rahâyam kon ze bande dardo khâki

sentences.word: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم
sentences.meaning: In the name of God, the Merciful, the Compassionate:
sentences.translit: Bismillâhir-rahmânir-rahim

sentences.word: هست کلید در گنج حکیم
sentences.meaning: This is the key to the door of the Wise One's treasury.
sentences.translit: Hast kelide dare ganje hakim

sentences.word: فاتحه فکرت و ختم سخن
sentences.meaning: It is the opening of thought and the completion of speech;
sentences.translit: Fâteheye fekrat o khatme sokhan

sentences.word: اوست قدیم همه چرخ و کهن
sentences.meaning: He is the ancient Lord of the universe and all that is old.
sentences.translit: Ust gadime hame charkh o kohan

sentences.word: خالق افلاک و زمین و هوا
sentences.meaning: The Creator of the heavens, the earth, and the sky;
sentences.translit: Khâleghe aflâko zamino havâ

sentences.word: بخشنده نان به شاه و گدا
sentences.meaning: The Giver of daily bread to king and beggar alike.
sentences.translit: Bakhshandeye nân be shâho gadâ

sentences.word: در حریمش ز نام و نشان
sentences.meaning: In His court of glory, far from name and sign,
sentences.translit: Dar harimash ze nâmo neshân

sentences.word: عقل فرو مانده و جان سرکشان
sentences.meaning: Intellect is left paralyzed, along with the souls of rebels.
sentences.translit: Aghl foru mânde o jâne sarkeshân

sentences.word: پرده‌نشین همه رازهای ما
sentences.meaning: He is the dweller behind the veil of all our secrets,
sentences.translit: Parde-neshine hame râzhâye mâ

sentences.word: همدم و همراه نیازهای ما
sentences.meaning: The companion and partner of all our needs.
sentences.translit: Hamdam o hamrâhe niyâzhâye mâ

sentences.word: جهان عشق است و دیگر زرق‌سازی
sentences.meaning: The world is love, and all else is mere deceit and tricks;
sentences.translit: Jahân eshgh ast o digar zargh-sâzi

sentences.word: به غیر از عشق هر کار است بازی
sentences.meaning: Except for love, every other occupation is but a game.
sentences.translit: Be gheyraz eshgh har kâr ast bâzi

sentences.word: اگر بی‌عشق بودی چرخ گردون
sentences.meaning: If the spinning wheel of heaven were without love,
sentences.translit: Agar bi-eshgh budi charkhe gardun

sentences.word: نگردیدی ز روی شوق افزون
sentences.meaning: It would not rotate with ever-increasing passion.
sentences.translit: Nagardidi ze ruye shogh afzun

sentences.word: زمین بی‌عشق پژمرده و بی‌جان
sentences.meaning: The earth without love would be withered and lifeless;
sentences.translit: Zamin bi-eshgh pejmorde va bi-jân

sentences.word: هوا بی‌عشق طوفانی و نالان
sentences.meaning: The wind without love would be stormy and wailing.
sentences.translit: Havâ bi-eshgh tufâni va nâlân

sentences.word: بیا تا در سرای عشق باشیم
sentences.meaning: Come, let us dwell in the palace of love,
sentences.translit: Biyâ tâ dar sarâye eshgh bâshim

sentences.word: ز بند هر غم و انده رها شیم
sentences.meaning: And be delivered from the shackles of all grief and sorrow,
sentences.translit: Ze bande har gham o andoh rahâ shimo

sentences.word: که هر کو در طریق عشق جان داد
sentences.meaning: For whoever gives their life on the path of love,
sentences.translit: Ke har ku dar tarighe eshgh jân dâd

sentences.word: به عالم جاودانی و نشان داد
sentences.meaning: Bequeaths eternity and a shining mark to the world.
sentences.translit: Be âlam jâvedâni va neshân dâd

sentences.word: من از نهایت شب حرف می‌زنم
sentences.meaning: I speak from the deep end of the night,
sentences.translit: Man az nahâyate shab harf mizanam

sentences.word: من از نهایت تاریکی
sentences.meaning: I speak from the deep end of darkness,
sentences.translit: Man az nahâyate târiki

sentences.word: و از نهایت شب حرف می‌زنم
sentences.meaning: And I speak from the deep end of the night.
sentences.translit: Va az nahâyate shab harf mizanam

sentences.word: اگر به خانه من آمدی برای من ای یار
sentences.meaning: If you come to my house, O beloved, for me
sentences.translit: Agar be khâneye man âmadi barâye man ey yâr

sentences.word: لطفا چراغ بیاور و یک دریچه که از آن
sentences.meaning: Please bring a lamp, and a small window through which
sentences.translit: Lotfan cherâgh biyâvar o yek dariche ke az ân

sentences.word: به ازدحام کوچه خوشبخت بنگرم
sentences.meaning: I may look at the crowd of the happy alleyway.
sentences.translit: Be ezdehâme kucheye khoshbakht bangaram

sentences.word: صدا، صدا، تنها صدا
sentences.meaning: Voice, voice, only voice!
sentences.translit: Sedâ, sedâ, tanhâ sedâ

sentences.word: صدای خواهش شفاف آب به جاری شدن
sentences.meaning: The sound of the water's clear plea to flow,
sentences.translit: Sedâye khâheshe shaffâfe âb be jâri shodan

sentences.word: صدای ریزش نور ستاره بر جدار خاک
sentences.meaning: The sound of star-light falling upon the wall of the earth,
sentences.translit: Sedâye rizishe nure setâre bar jedâre khâk

sentences.word: صدای انعقاد نطفه پنهان عشق در رگ‌ها
sentences.meaning: The sound of the secret seed of love taking root in the veins,
sentences.translit: Sedâye eneghâde notfeye penhâne eshgh dar raghâ

sentences.word: صدای وزش باد در پهنه وسیع دشت
sentences.meaning: The sound of the wind blowing across the wide span of the plain.
sentences.translit: Sedâye vazeshe bâd dar pahneye vasi'e dasht

sentences.word: چرا توقف کنم، چرا
sentences.meaning: Why should I stop? Why?
sentences.translit: Cherâ tavaghghof konam, cherâ

sentences.word: پرنده‌ها به جستجوی جانب آبی رفته‌اند
sentences.meaning: The birds have gone in search of the blue horizon.
sentences.translit: Parandehâ be jostojuye jânebe âbi rafte'and

sentences.word: صداست که می‌ماند و تن فانیست
sentences.meaning: It is the voice that remains, while the body is mortal;
sentences.translit: Sedâst ke mimânad o tan fâni'st

sentences.word: تنها صداست که می‌ماند
sentences.meaning: Only the voice remains.
sentences.translit: Tanhâ sedâst ke mimânad

sentences.word: بیش از اینها می‌توان خاموش ماند
sentences.meaning: One can remain silent far more than this;
sentences.translit: Bish az inhâ mitavân khâmosh mând

sentences.word: می‌توان ساعات طولانی
sentences.meaning: One can, for long hours,
sentences.translit: Mitavân sâ'âte tulâni

sentences.word: با نگاهی چون نگاه مردگان ثابت
sentences.meaning: With a fixed stare like the stare of the dead,
sentences.translit: Bâ negâhi chon negâhe mordegân sâbet

sentences.word: خیره شد در دود یک سیگار
sentences.meaning: Gaze into the smoke of a cigarette,
sentences.translit: Khire shod dar dude yek sigâr

sentences.word: خیره شد در شکل یک فنجان
sentences.meaning: Gaze into the shape of a cup.
sentences.translit: Khire shod dar shekle yek fenjân

sentences.word: می‌توان با هر فشار پنجه‌ای بی‌قصد
sentences.meaning: One can, with any mindless pressure of a finger,
sentences.translit: Mitavân bâ har feshâre panje'i bi-ghasd

sentences.word: شیون پر وحشتی را سر داد
sentences.meaning: Release a scream of absolute horror.
sentences.translit: Shiyane por vahshati râ sar dâd

sentences.word: می‌توان چون عروسک‌های کوکی بود
sentences.meaning: One can be like wind-up toy dolls,
sentences.translit: Mitavân chon arousakhâye koki bud

sentences.word: با دو چشم شیشه‌ای جهان را دید
sentences.meaning: Viewing the world with two eyes of glass,
sentences.translit: Bâ do chashme shishe'i jahân râ did

sentences.word: در سبد خوابید و بیدار شد
sentences.meaning: Sleeping and waking inside a felt basket.
sentences.translit: Dar sabad khâbid o bidâr shod

sentences.word: در شب کوچک من، افسوس
sentences.meaning: In my tiny night, alas,
sentences.translit: Dar shabe kucheke man, afsus

sentences.word: باد با برگ درختان میعادی دارد
sentences.meaning: The wind has a rendezvous with the leaves of the trees.
sentences.translit: Bâd bâ barge derakhtân mi'âdi dârad

sentences.word: در شب کوچک من دلهره ویرانیست
sentences.meaning: In my tiny night, there is the anxiety of ruin.
sentences.translit: Dar shabe kucheke man delhoreye virâni'st

sentences.word: گوش کن، وزش باد را می‌شنوی
sentences.meaning: Listen! Do you hear the blowing of the wind?
sentences.translit: Gush kon, vazeshe bâd râ mishnavi

sentences.word: من به این خوشبختی اندوهبار می‌نگرم
sentences.meaning: I look upon this melancholic happiness.
sentences.translit: Man be in khoshbakhtiye andohbâr minegaram

sentences.word: من به این شب غریب معتادم
sentences.meaning: I am addicted to this strange night.
sentences.translit: Man be in shabe gharib mo'tâdam

sentences.word: باد در کوچه باغ‌ها می‌وزد
sentences.meaning: The wind is blowing in the garden lanes.
sentences.translit: Bâd dar kuche bâgh-hâ mi-vazad

sentences.word: شب در عبور شتابناک خویش است
sentences.meaning: The night is in its fast, rushing passage.
sentences.translit: Shab dar obure shetâbnâke khish ast

sentences.word: باد ما را خواهد برد، باد ما را خواهد برد
sentences.meaning: The wind will carry us away, the wind will carry us away.
sentences.translit: Bâd mâ râ khâhad bord, bâd mâ râ khâhad bord

sentences.word: همه هستی من آیه تاریکیست
sentences.meaning: My entire existence is a dark verse,
sentences.translit: Hameye hastiye man âyeye târiki'st

sentences.word: که تو را در خود تکرارکنان
sentences.meaning: Which, repeating you within itself,
sentences.translit: Ke to râ dar khod tekrâr-konân

sentences.word: به سحرگاه شکفتن‌ها و رستن‌های ابدی خواهد برد
sentences.meaning: Will carry you to the dawn of eternal blossomings and growth.
sentences.translit: Be sahargâhe shekoftan-hâ va rostan-hâye abadi khâhad bord

sentences.word: من در این آیه تو را آه کشیدم، آه
sentences.meaning: In this dark verse, I sighed you, ah!
sentences.translit: Man dar in âye to râ âh kashidam, âh

sentences.word: من در این آیه تو را به درخت و آب پیوند زدم
sentences.meaning: In this verse, I grafted you onto the tree and the water.
sentences.translit: Man dar in âye to râ be derakhto âb peyvand zadam

sentences.word: زندگی شاید یک خیابان دراز است
sentences.meaning: Life is perhaps a long avenue
sentences.translit: Zendegi shâyad yek khiyâbâne derâz ast

sentences.word: که هر روز زنی با سبدی از آن می‌گذرد
sentences.meaning: Through which a woman with a basket passes every day.
sentences.translit: Ke har ruz zani bâ sabadi az ân migozarad

sentences.word: زندگی شاید عبور گیج یک رهگذر است
sentences.meaning: Life is perhaps the dazed passage of a pedestrian
sentences.translit: Zendegi shâyad obure gije yek rahgozar ast

sentences.word: که کلاه از سر برمی‌دارد
sentences.meaning: Who lifts his hat from his head,
sentences.translit: Ke kolâh az sar bar-midârad

sentences.word: و به یک رهگذر دیگر با لبخندی بی‌معنی می‌گوید صبح بخیر
sentences.meaning: And says to another pedestrian with a meaningless smile: 'Good morning.'
sentences.translit: Va be yek rahgozare digar bâ labkhandi bi-ma'ni miguyad sobh bekheyr

sentences.word: اهل کاشانم
sentences.meaning: I am from Kashan;
sentences.translit: Ahle Kâshânam

sentences.word: روزگارم بد نیست
sentences.meaning: My life is not so bad.
sentences.translit: Ruzegâram bad nist

sentences.word: تکه نانی دارم، خرده هوشی، سر سوزن ذوقی
sentences.meaning: I have a bite of bread, a scrap of intelligence, a tiny needle-point of taste.
sentences.translit: Tekke nâni dâram, khorde hushi, sare suzan zoughi

sentences.word: مادری دارم، بهتر از برگ درخت
sentences.meaning: I have a mother, better than the leaves of trees;
sentences.translit: Mâdari dâram, behtar az barge derakht

sentences.word: دوستانی، بهتر از آب روان
sentences.meaning: And friends, better than flowing water.
sentences.translit: Dustâni, behtar az âbe ravân

sentences.word: و خدایی که در این نزدیکیست
sentences.meaning: And a God who is nearby here,
sentences.translit: Va khodâ'i ke dar in nazdikist

sentences.word: لای این شب‌بوها، پای آن کاج بلند
sentences.meaning: Dwelling amidst these gillyflowers, beneath that tall pine,
sentences.translit: Lâye in shab-buhâ, pâye ân kâje boland

sentences.word: روی آگاهی آب، روی قانون گیاه
sentences.meaning: Upon the consciousness of water, upon the law of plants.
sentences.translit: Ruye âgâhiye âb, ruye ghânune ghiyâh

sentences.word: من مسلمانم
sentences.meaning: I am a Muslim;
sentences.translit: Man mosalmânam

sentences.word: قبله‌ام یک گل سرخ
sentences.meaning: My prayer direction is a red rose,
sentences.translit: Gheble'am yek gole sorkh

sentences.word: جانمازم چشمه، مهرم نور
sentences.meaning: My prayer-mat is a spring, my prayer-clay is light,
sentences.translit: Jâ-namâzam cheshme, mehram nur

sentences.word: دشت سجاده من
sentences.meaning: And the plain is my prayer carpet.
sentences.translit: Dasht sajjâdeye man

sentences.word: خانه دوست کجاست
sentences.meaning: 'Where is the Friend's home?'
sentences.translit: Khâneye dost kojâst

sentences.word: در فلق بود که پرسید سوار
sentences.meaning: It was at dawn that the rider asked.
sentences.translit: Dar falagh bud ke porsid sovâr

sentences.word: آسمان مکثی کرد
sentences.meaning: The sky paused for a moment;
sentences.translit: Âsemân maksi kard

sentences.word: رهگذر شاخه نوری که به لب داشت به تاریکی شن‌ها بخشید
sentences.meaning: The pedestrian gifted the branch of light he held on his lips to the darkness of the sands,
sentences.translit: Rahgozar shâkheye nuri ke be lab dâht be târikiye shenhâ bakhshid

sentences.word: و به انگشت نشان داد و گفت
sentences.meaning: And pointed with his finger, saying:
sentences.translit: Va be angosht neshân dâd o goft

sentences.word: نرسیده به درخت
sentences.meaning: 'Just before you reach the tree,
sentences.translit: Nareside be derakht

sentences.word: کوچه‌باغی است که از خواب خدا سبزتر است
sentences.meaning: There is a garden lane that is greener than the dream of God.
sentences.translit: Kuche-bâghi'st ke az khâbe khodâ sabztar ast

sentences.word: و در آن عشق به اندازه پرهای صداقت آبی است
sentences.meaning: And inside it, love is as blue as the feathers of honesty.
sentences.translit: Va dar ân eshgh be andâzeye parhâye sedâghat âbi'st

sentences.word: می‌روی تا ته آن کوچه که از پشت بلوغ، سر به در می‌آرد
sentences.meaning: You walk to the end of that lane which emerges from behind maturity,
sentences.translit: Miravi tâ tahe ân kuche ke az poshte bolugh sar be dar mi-ârad

sentences.word: پس به سمت گل تنهایی می‌پیچی
sentences.meaning: Then you turn towards the flower of solitude.
sentences.translit: Pas be samte gole tanhâ'i mipichi

sentences.word: دو قدم مانده به گل
sentences.meaning: Two steps before you reach the flower,
sentences.translit: Do ghadam mânde be gol

sentences.word: پای فواره جاوید اساطیر زمین می‌مانی
sentences.meaning: You stop at the foot of the eternal fountain of earth's mythologies.'
sentences.translit: Pâye favvâreye jâvide asâtire zamin mimâni

sentences.word: باید کتاب را بست
sentences.meaning: One must close the book;
sentences.translit: Bâyad ketâb râ bast

sentences.word: باید بلند شد
sentences.meaning: One must stand up,
sentences.translit: Bâyad boland shod

sentences.word: در امتداد وقت قدم زد
sentences.meaning: Walk along the span of time,
sentences.translit: Dar emtedâde vaght ghadam zad

sentences.word: گل را نگاه کرد
sentences.meaning: Gaze upon the flower,
sentences.translit: Gol râ negâh kard

sentences.word: ابهام را شنید
sentences.meaning: Hear the ambiguity.
sentences.translit: Ebhâm râ shenid

sentences.word: باید دوید تا بن بستی
sentences.meaning: One must run until reaching a dead end;
sentences.translit: Bâyad david tâ bon-basti

sentences.word: باید نشست نزدیک چشمه‌ها
sentences.meaning: One must sit beside the water springs,
sentences.translit: Bâyad neshast nazdike cheshmehâ

sentences.word: و تر شد از طراوت پاک زمین
sentences.meaning: And become wet with the clean freshness of the earth.
sentences.translit: Va tar shod az tarâvate pâke zamin

sentences.word: باید ببوئیم یاس را
sentences.meaning: We must smell the jasmine,
sentences.translit: Bâyad bebu'im yâs râ

sentences.word: و عشق بورزیم به برگ درختان
sentences.meaning: And show love to the leaves of the trees.
sentences.translit: Va eshgh varzim be barge derakhtân

sentences.word: قایقی خواهم ساخت
sentences.meaning: I will build a boat,
sentences.translit: Ghayeghi khâham sâkht

sentences.word: خواهم انداخت به آب
sentences.meaning: I will cast it onto the water,
sentences.translit: Khâham andâkht be âb

sentences.word: دور خواهم شد از این خاک غریب
sentences.meaning: I will distance myself from this strange soil
sentences.translit: Dur khâham shod az in khâke gharib

sentences.word: که در آن هیچ‌کسی نیست که در بیشه عشق
sentences.meaning: In which there is no one left, who inside the forest of love,
sentences.translit: Ke dar ân hich-kasi nist ke dar bisheye eshgh

sentences.word: قهرمانان را بیدار کند
sentences.meaning: Would wake up the sleeping heroes.
sentences.translit: Ghahremânân râ bidâr konad

sentences.word: قایق از تور هنوز
sentences.meaning: The boat is still empty of nets,
sentences.translit: Ghayegh az tur hanuz

sentences.word: و دل از شوق رهایی لرزان
sentences.meaning: And the heart is trembling from the passion of freedom.
sentences.translit: Va del az shoghe rahâ'i larzân

sentences.word: همچنان خواهم راند
sentences.meaning: I will continue to sail on.
sentences.translit: Hamchonân khâham rând

sentences.word: پشت دریاها شهریست
sentences.meaning: Beyond the seas, there is a city,
sentences.translit: Poshte daryâhâ shahri'st

sentences.word: که در آن پنجره‌ها رو به تجلی باز است
sentences.meaning: Where the windows are open towards divine illumination.
sentences.translit: Ke dar ân panjerehâ ru be tajalli bâz ast

sentences.word: آب را گل نکنیم
sentences.meaning: Let's not muddy the stream's water;
sentences.translit: Âb râ gel nakonim

sentences.word: در فرودست انگار، کفتری می‌خورد آب
sentences.meaning: Downstream, it seems, a pigeon is drinking the water,
sentences.translit: Dar forudast engâr, kaftari mikhorad âb

sentences.word: یا که در بیشه دور، سیره‌ای پر می‌شوید
sentences.meaning: Or in a distant thicket, a finch is washing its wings,
sentences.translit: Yâ ke dar bisheye dur, sire'i par mishuyad

sentences.word: یا در آبادی، کوزه‌ای پر می‌گردد
sentences.meaning: Or in a village hamlet, a clay pitcher is being filled.
sentences.translit: Yâ dar âbâdi, kuze'i por migardad

sentences.word: شاید این آب روان، می‌رود پای سپیداری، تا فرو شوید اندوه دلی
sentences.meaning: Perhaps this flowing water goes to the foot of a poplar tree, to wash away the grief of a heart.
sentences.translit: Shâyad in âbe ravân miravad pâye sepidâri tâ foru shuyad andohe deli

sentences.word: دست درویشی شاید، نان خشکیده فرو برده در آب
sentences.meaning: Perhaps a dervish's hand has dipped a piece of dry bread into the water.
sentences.translit: Daste darvishi shâyad, nâne khoshkide foru borde dar âb

sentences.word: زن زیبایی آمد لب رود
sentences.meaning: A gorgeous woman has come to the river bank;
sentences.translit: Zane zibâ'i âmad labe rud

sentences.word: روی زیبای دو چندان شده است
sentences.meaning: Her beautiful face's reflection is doubled in the clear water.
sentences.translit: Ruye zibâyi do chandân shode ast

sentences.word: سیر یک روز طعنه زد به پیاز
sentences.meaning: One day, garlic taunted the onion,
sentences.translit: Sir yek ruz ta'ne zad be piyâz

sentences.word: که تو مسکین چقدر بدبویی
sentences.meaning: 'How terribly smelly you are, you poor thing!'
sentences.translit: Ke toye moskin cheghadr bad-buyi

sentences.word: گفت از چهره تو پدیدار است
sentences.meaning: The onion replied: 'It is obvious from your own face
sentences.translit: Goft az chehreve to padidâr ast

sentences.word: که ز راه صلاح بیرون پویی
sentences.meaning: That you wander far away from the path of rectitude.
sentences.translit: Ke ze râhe salâh birun puyi

sentences.word: تو خودت سر تا پا عیب و بدی
sentences.meaning: You yourself are filled with flaws and badness from head to toe,
sentences.translit: To khodat sar tâ pâ eyb o badi

sentences.word: ز چه عیب دیگران می‌جویی
sentences.meaning: Why do you seek out the flaws of others?
sentences.translit: Ze che eybe digarân mijuyi

sentences.word: من اگر بویی دارم ز طبیعت است
sentences.meaning: If I have an odor, it is from my basic nature,
sentences.translit: Man agar buyi dâram ze tabi'at ast

sentences.word: نه ز سالوس و مکر و جادویی
sentences.meaning: Not from hypocrisy, deceit, and spells.
sentences.translit: Na ze sâluso makro jâduyi

sentences.word: خودپرستی مکن که در این راه
sentences.meaning: Do not practice self-worship, for on this path
sentences.translit: Khod-parasti makon ke dar in râh

sentences.word: نیست جز گمراهی و بدخویی
sentences.meaning: There is nothing except wandering lost and bad temper.'
sentences.translit: Nist joz gomrâhi o bad-khuyi

sentences.word: محتسب مستی به ره دید و گریبانش گرفت
sentences.meaning: The constable saw a drunkard on the path and grabbed him by the collar.
sentences.translit: Mohtaseb masti be rah did o geribânash gereft

sentences.word: مست گفت ای دوست این پیراهن است افسار نیست
sentences.meaning: The drunkard said: 'O friend, this is a shirt, it is not a horse's halter!'
sentences.translit: Mast goft ey dost in pirâhan ast afsâr nist

sentences.word: گفت مستی زان سبب افتان و خیزان می‌روی
sentences.meaning: The constable said: 'You are drunk, which is why you are stumbling along.'
sentences.translit: Goft masti zân sabab oftân o khizân miravi

sentences.word: گفت جرم راه رفتن نیست ره هموار نیست
sentences.meaning: He replied: 'It is not the fault of my walking; the road is not flat and even.'
sentences.translit: Goft jorme râh raftan nist rah hamvâr nist

sentences.word: گفت می‌باید تو را تا خانه قاضی برم
sentences.meaning: The constable said: 'I must drag you to the house of the judge.'
sentences.translit: Goft mibâyad to râ tâ khâneye ghâzi baram

sentences.word: گفت رو صبح آی قاضی نیمه‌شب بیدار نیست
sentences.meaning: He replied: 'Go, come back in the morning; the judge is not awake at midnight.'
sentences.translit: Goft ro sobh ây ghâzi nime-shab bidâr nist

sentences.word: گفت داروغه به مسجد در بخواباند تو را
sentences.meaning: The constable said: 'The chief of police will put you to sleep inside the mosque.'
sentences.translit: Goft dârughe be masjed dar bekhvâbânad to râ

sentences.word: گفت مسجد خوابگاه مردم بی کار نیست
sentences.meaning: He replied: 'The mosque is not a bedroom for lazy, unemployed people!'
sentences.translit: Goft masjed khvâbgâhe mardome bi-kâr nist

sentences.word: گفت دیناری بده تا خود رها سازم تو را
sentences.meaning: The constable said: 'Pay me a gold coin, so I can release you.'
sentences.translit: Goft dinâri bede tâ khod rahâ sâzam to râ

sentences.word: گفت کار شرع با دینار و با بازار نیست
sentences.meaning: He replied: 'The business of divine law does not deal in coins and marketplaces.'
sentences.translit: Goft kâre shar' bâ dinâr o bâ bâzâr nist

sentences.word: روزی گذشت پادشهی از گذرگهی
sentences.meaning: One day, a king passed by a thoroughfare;
sentences.translit: Ruzi gozasht pâdashehi az gozargahi

sentences.word: فریاد شوق بر سر هر کوی و بام خاست
sentences.meaning: Shouts of excitement rose up from every street-corner and roof.
sentences.translit: Faryâde shogh bar sare har kuyo bâm khâst

sentences.word: پرسید زان میانه یکی کودک یتیم
sentences.meaning: An orphan child asked from midst the crowd:
sentences.translit: Porsid zân miâne yaki kudake yatim

sentences.word: کاین تابناک چیست که بر تاج پادشاست
sentences.meaning: 'What is that sparkling object upon the king's crown?'
sentences.translit: K'in tâbnâk chist ke bar tâje pâdeshâst

sentences.word: آن یک جواب داد چه دانیم ما که چیست
sentences.meaning: Another answered: 'How should we know what it is?
sentences.translit: Ân yek javâb dâd che dânim mâ ke chist

sentences.word: پیداست کاین گهر ز خون دل ماست
sentences.meaning: But it is obvious that this gem is made from our heart's blood.'
sentences.translit: Peydâst k'in gohar ze khune dele mâst

sentences.word: ما را به رخت و چوب شبانی فریفته‌اند
sentences.meaning: They have deceived us with shepherd's garments and staff;
sentences.translit: Mâ râ be rakhto chube shabâni farifte'and

sentences.word: این اشک دیده من و خون دل شماست
sentences.meaning: This is the tear of my eye, and the blood of your heart.
sentences.translit: In ashke dideye man o khune dele shomâst

sentences.word: پروین به کار خرد و بزرگان نگاه کن
sentences.meaning: Parvin, look closely at the deeds of the small and the great,
sentences.translit: Parvin be kâre khordo bozorgân negâh kon

sentences.word: کز عدل و داد هیچ نشانی عیان نخواست
sentences.meaning: For no visible trace of justice and equity was ever desired.
sentences.translit: Kaz adlo dâd hich neshâni ayân nakhvâst

sentences.word: گفت سوزن با نخ کای هرزه‌پوی
sentences.meaning: The needle said to the thread: 'O idle wanderer,
sentences.translit: Goft suzan bâ nakh k'ey harze-puy

sentences.word: در پی من چند پویی کوی‌به‌کوی
sentences.meaning: Why do you run behind me from street to street?'
sentences.translit: Dar peye man chand puyi kuy-be-kuy

sentences.word: بگفتا گرنه پویای توام
sentences.meaning: The thread replied: 'If I were not pursuing you,
sentences.translit: Bageftâ gar ne puyâye to'am

sentences.word: رشته کار خود از هم بگسلم
sentences.meaning: I would break the thread of my work apart.
sentences.translit: Reshteye kâre khod az ham bogsalam

sentences.word: ما دو همراهیم در کار و تلاش
sentences.meaning: We two are companions in labor and effort;
sentences.translit: Mâ do hamrâhim dar kâro talâsh

sentences.word: بی‌تو من هیچم در این دشت و جاش
sentences.meaning: Without you, I am nothing in this open field.
sentences.translit: Bi-to man hicham dar in dashto jâsh

sentences.word: گر نباشد همبستگی بین ما
sentences.meaning: If there is no solidarity between us,
sentences.translit: Gar nabâshad hambastegi beyne mâ

sentences.word: جامه نو کی شود آماده تا
sentences.meaning: When will a new garment ever be made ready?
sentences.translit: Jâmeye no key shavad âmâde tâ

sentences.word: پس بیا تا با صمیمیت مدام
sentences.meaning: So come, let us with constant sincerity
sentences.translit: Pas biyâ tâ bâ samimiyat modâm

sentences.word: کار خود را ما رسانیم به کام
sentences.meaning: Guide our work to a successful completion.'
sentences.translit: Kâre khod râ mâ rasânim be kâm

sentences.word: روزی زنی به همسر خود گفت در سخن
sentences.meaning: One day, a woman said to her husband during a conversation:
sentences.translit: Ruzi zani be hamsare khod goft dar sokhan

sentences.word: این اشک چیست کاین همه بی قدر و قیمت است
sentences.meaning: 'What is this tear, which is so worthless and cheap?
sentences.translit: In ashk chist k'in hame bi-ghadro gheymat ast

sentences.word: آیا گهر که ارزش بسیار دارد او
sentences.meaning: Is not a gemstone, which has so much value,
sentences.translit: Âyâ gohar ke arzeshe besyâr dârad u

sentences.word: زیباتر از سرشک روان در مصیبت است
sentences.meaning: Far more beautiful than flowing tears in times of tragedy?'
sentences.translit: Zibâtar az sereshke ravân dar mosibat ast

sentences.word: همسر بگفت اشک یتیمان و بینوای
sentences.meaning: The husband replied: 'The tear of orphans and the helpless
sentences.translit: Hamsar begoft ashke yatimâno binavây

sentences.word: ارزشمندتر از گهر تاج دولت است
sentences.meaning: Is far more precious than the gem of a government's crown.
sentences.translit: Arzesh-mand-tar az gohare tâje doulat ast

sentences.word: آن یک نماد پاکی و اخلاص و سادگی
sentences.meaning: That tear is a symbol of purity, sincerity, and simplicity;
sentences.translit: Ân yek nemâde pâkiyo ikhlâso sâdeghi

sentences.word: این یک نشان ثروت و ظلم و جراحت است
sentences.meaning: This gem is a sign of wealth, oppression, and wounds.
sentences.translit: In yek neshâne servato zolmo jerâhat ast

sentences.word: پس اشک خود مدار سبک در جهان ما
sentences.meaning: So, do not hold your tears cheap in our world,
sentences.translit: Pas ashke khod madâr sabok deb jahâne mâ

sentences.word: کاو جوهر حقیقت و نور فضیلت است
sentences.meaning: For it is the essence of truth and the light of virtue.'
sentences.translit: K'u johare haghighato nure fazilat ast

sentences.word: اینقدر که یک ماهی پرنده محسوب میشه خفاش پرنده محسوب نمیشه
sentences.meaning: A bat is not a bird any more than a fish is.
sentences.translit: aynghdr kh yk mahy prndh mhsvb myshh khfash prndh mhsvb nmyshh

sentences.word: یک تشکر بزرگ برای کمک شما
sentences.meaning: A big thanks for your help.
sentences.translit: yk tshkr bzrg bray kmk shma

sentences.word: سیلی نقد به از حلوای نسیه
sentences.meaning: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
sentences.translit: syly nghd bh az hlvay nsyh

sentences.word: یک چک سفید‌امضا؟ چنین چیزی را فقط توی فیلم‌ها می‌توانی ببینی
sentences.meaning: A blank check? You only see those in movies.
sentences.translit: yk chk sfyd amza؟ chnyn chyzy ra fght tvy fylm ha my tvany bbyny

sentences.word: یک زن بلوند با روانپزشکش صحبت می‌کند
sentences.meaning: A blonde is speaking to her psychiatrist.
sentences.translit: yk zn blvnd ba rvanpzshksh shbt my knd

sentences.word: کرایه‌ی تاکسی از اینجا تقریبا چقدر می‌شود
sentences.meaning: About how much would a taxi be from here?
sentences.translit: krayh y taksy az aynja tghryba chghdr my shvd

sentences.word: بالاتر از هر چیز این است که صبور باشی
sentences.meaning: Above all, be patient.
sentences.translit: balatr az hr chyz ayn ast kh sbvr bashy

sentences.word: دوری باعث علاقمندی می شود
sentences.meaning: Absence makes the heart grow fonder.

sentences.word: خانواده من را دوست داشتند

sentences.word: خانه او در کوهپایه است

sentences.word: چشم راست او کور است

sentences.word: موفقیتش او را آماج حسادت کرد

sentences.word: او به من گفت: بچه ها مثل حیوانات کوچک هستند

sentences.word: او با ظاهری بهت زده، گفت: من چیزی نشنیده ام، بنابراین نمی توانم چیزی بگویم

sentences.word: او از دست فرزندش عصبانی است

sentences.word: او زندگی مرا نجات داد

sentences.word: به نظر می آید او نفهمیده باشد

sentences.word: او خسته به نظر می رسد

sentences.word: او وانمود می کند که ورزشکاری بزرگ بوده است

sentences.word: او محبتش را با نصیحتی به من نشان داد
